rows.label: tev020901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Gina about the people of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Gina about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Gina about her
experiences with the Ma-non.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Gina for her thoughts on
the xenoforms living in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0001
rows.name:
I bet that when you BLADEs return to NLA after a
long deployment, you're sometimes confused by all
the changes that have occurred in the city.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0002
rows.name:
When that happens, you should
just go for a walk and listen to
what people are talking about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0003
rows.name:
When something changes around here, the topics of
conversation around the city change, too. You might
overhear information that's important to you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0004
rows.name:
And of course, if you don't overhear
the information you were looking for,
it never hurts to ask directly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0005
rows.name:
Civilians are usually eager to
help out a BLADE, so you needn't
be shy. Ask whatever you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0008
rows.name:
I met a guy the other day who was the
biggest boozehound I've ever seen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0009
rows.name:
And believe me, I meet a lot of
heavy drinkers in my line of work.
But never anyone like this before.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0010
rows.name:
The friends he was drinking with got
drunk one by one, and by morning there
was a pile of bodies around his table.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0011
rows.name:
I was so taken aback by the
pace of their drinking that I
never thought to ask his name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0012
rows.name:
But I think he mentioned that he
usually does his drinking at the
diner in the industrial district.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0013
rows.name:
He was a pretty interesting guy. I
hope he comes back to my place again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0021
rows.name:
We've had a lot of Ma-non customers coming
in lately. It's fun to have them around—they're
always so lively and cheerful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0022
rows.name:
The other day, a bunch of them got
drunk and started dancing in a circle.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0023
rows.name:
They even got some nearby BLADEs
to join them. It's like they were
holding a little dance party![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0024
rows.name:
After all the casualties we've suffered
in the fight with the Growth, the mood
around the city has darkened considerably.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0025
rows.name:
But thanks to the Ma-non, our place is still
full of people laughing and having a good time.
Xenoforms like that are always welcome here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0041
rows.name:
We get a lot of xenoforms in my place,
and they all have such different lifestyles
and perspectives on the world.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0042
rows.name:
And when all those different
types assemble in one spot, you
never know what's gonna happen![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0043
rows.name:
The Bias start fights, the Nopon start
taking wagers on the outcome...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0044
rows.name:
Meanwhile, the Orphe nibble on
grass and chat amongst themselves.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0045
rows.name:
I guess chaotic is the best word
to describe it. But I really love
how exciting NLA has become![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Gina about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0046
rows.name:
When I saw Lyvia abruptly transform
like that, it blew me away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0047
rows.name:
I was so stunned, I forgot
all about my broken heart![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0048
rows.name:
And besides, there are plenty of
other fish in the sea. Although none
are quite as handsome as him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev020901_MSG0049
rows.name:
Er, but don't worry about me. I hope
you two are very happy together.[ST:wait ]
